subcodes.title: Tablet of Visitation for Manuchihr Khan
subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be salutations and praise, and on thee rest blessings and glory, O leader of the ministers and sovereign of the rulers, O resplendent sun among the officials
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک التحیه و علیک الثناء و علیک الصلاه و علیک البهاء یا سید الوزراء و ملیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
